response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates extensive full-stack development experience across multiple industries, with a strong alignment to the required technical stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker) and additional expertise in Kotlin/Java. Her background includes AI-agent infrastructure, scalability challenges, and leadership in open-source projects, indicating both depth and breadth of technical skills. While her primary focus leans toward D and Ember.js rather than Nest.js, her adaptability and polyglot programming experience suggest a rapid onboarding capability.
strengths: 10+ years of full-stack development with deep technical versatility across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and multiple languages
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and high-load systems, demonstrating scalability and performance optimization
Proven leadership in open-source projects and mentorship (e.g., Refactoring Dojos, Selenium courses)
concerns: Limited explicit experience with Nest.js (primary required backend framework) and Vitest (primary testing framework)
Primary stack leans toward D/Ember.js rather than the specified React/Vitest/Nest.js combination
No direct mention of PostgreSQL/MySQL expertise (focus on MongoDB)
